assertionResults.title: Intraday series render with shared time axis (8 PM – 8 AM)
assertionResults.observed: Night UI did not render glucose strip and did not show shared overnight axis alignment; screen only showed HR panel + no-sleep-stage message.

assertionResults.title: Sleep hypnogram renders with stage differentiation
assertionResults.observed: Night UI showed "No sleep stage data available"; no stage bars/legend rendered.

assertionResults.title: Summary strip with polarity-colored delta badges
assertionResults.observed: Summary strip omitted Sleep Latency metric/delta; only Sleep Score, Deep Sleep, HRV, and RHR were present.

assertionResults.title: S1 scenario — meal → glucose spike → HR → sleep disruption causal chain
assertionResults.observed: Required S1 chain was not visible end-to-end (no glucose panel, no hypnogram stage rendering, and no required red delta triplet).

assertionResults.title: Multi-day sparklines with shared day axis and baseline bands
assertionResults.observed: Recovery view rendered Readiness/HRV/RHR/Sleep Score, but Body Temp Deviation panel required by contract was missing.

assertionResults.title: S3 scenario — post-workout recovery arc visible at a glance
assertionResults.observed: S3-specific expectations not present (no "10K run", no "3 days" insight text; header values observed Readiness 67 and HRV 76.4 instead of expected trajectory).

assertionResults.title: Fresh baselines render as normal range bands on frontend
assertionResults.observed: Night API baseline keys omitted heart_rate and DOM inspection showed chart area fill-opacity 0.6, not ≤0.15 baseline-band contract.

apiSnippets: baseline keys: deep_sleep, hrv, rhr, sleep_score; heart_rate missing (VAL-CROSS-007-baseline-api-check.json)

assertionResults.title: Night view window spans yesterday 8 PM to today 8 AM correctly
assertionResults.observed: API window bounds were correct, but UI evidence did not show required 8 PM–8 AM axis labeling on the tested screen.

assertionResults.title: Duration annotation spanning night boundary included
assertionResults.observed: Created boundary-spanning workout annotation was included in Night API and rendered at chart left edge in UI annotation layer.

assertionResults.title: Night view for in-progress night handles incomplete data
assertionResults.observed: Runtime was past window end, so tested date returned a completed night window (not in-progress) and the required precondition was unmet.

frictions.description: Initial navigation to /dashboard redirected to /sign-in in fresh session.
frictions.resolution: Generated mock auth token for user_test_001 and set __session cookie in browser session.

frictions.description: agent-browser request list does not provide HTTP status/body details needed for cross assertions.
frictions.resolution: Collected supplemental curl artifacts for CROSS-007/019/024/020 API evidence snippets.

frictions.description: Heart Rate expansion click was intermittently blocked by overlay interception.
frictions.resolution: Used DOM click targeting by aria-label to expand strip and capture evidence.

blockers.description: In-progress-night runtime precondition not available during rerun window; API responded with completed night range.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Captured runtime clock + repeated GET /api/views/night?date=2026-04-05; window remained complete.

summary: Tested 10 assigned assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CROSS-024), 8 failed (VAL-UINGT-001/002/003/004, VAL-UIRCV-001/003, VAL-CROSS-007, VAL-CROSS-019), and 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-020).
